metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code skills for enhanced AI-assisted development workflows.

plugins.name: aitc-workflow
plugins.description: Manually invoked workflow orchestrator for long-running multi-agent batch tasks. Provides Plan, Execute, and Lifecycle modes for team coordination and knowledge capture.

plugins.name: github-pr-reviewer
plugins.description: Automated GitHub PR reviewer that deep-analyzes pull requests and posts structured review feedback with inline comments, suggestions, and an approve/request-changes verdict.

plugins.name: github-pr-fixer
plugins.description: Automated GitHub PR fixer that reads review feedback, implements code fixes, runs tests, and replies to reviewers until all review threads are resolved.

plugins.name: md2pdf
plugins.description: Convert Markdown documents to PDF with CJK/Latin mixed text, fenced code blocks, tables, and clickable TOC. Simplified GitHub Light theme.

plugins.name: guardian
plugins.description: Deploy a persistent Guardian teammate to monitor an agent team's progress via tmux on a recurring cron loop. Intervenes only when the team gets stuck.

plugins.name: amd-strix-halo-gpu-npu
plugins.description: AMD Strix Halo GPU (ROCm) and NPU (XDNA/XRT) driver setup and usage guide for GPU computing, NPU inference, and ML framework installation on AMD hardware.

plugins.name: nas-index
plugins.description: NAS file system index and navigation guide for /mnt/nas/database. Enables agents to quickly locate files across Downloads, backups, media libraries, Docker configs, AI models, and other NAS directories.

plugins.name: knowledge-base
plugins.description: Personal knowledge base on NAS — read, write, search, and maintain notes across categories (tech notes, reading notes, project docs, resources, daily notes, CGRA papers). Access via SSH.

plugins.name: academic-pdf-to-html
plugins.description: Convert academic PDF papers to beautifully styled HTML with Chinese summaries, chapter indexes, and grouped figures. Uses MinerU for extraction and deterministic post-processing.
